what_it_does: This file is a JSON array that enumerates a batch of file entries for the 'claude-ds' project, pairing each relative path with the absolute root directory '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'.
observations: Every entry uses the same project value 'claude-ds' and the same root path.
The listed paths include a manifest, a template, audit documents, and axis/refactor analysis documents.
There are no code symbols in the file; it is purely a path inventory.
standouts: The batch is entirely composed of design/analysis documentation and the project manifest.
All entries share a single absolute root, making the batch tightly scoped to one project tree.
The file sits in a 'wave-001/alloc' directory, suggesting it is part of a phased allocation workflow.
conventions: Uses a JSON array of uniform objects with 'project', 'path', and 'root' keys.
Relative paths are recorded without leading slashes while the root is an absolute filesystem path.
Batch files are named 'batch-NNN.json' inside a wave/alloc hierarchy.
notes: A wave-001 allocation batch that lists six claude-ds files—mostly analysis docs and the project manifest—for downstream interpretive processing.
questions: What criteria determined which files belong to batch-002 versus other batches?
What downstream process consumes this allocation list?
What is the intended role of '_ds_manifest.json' relative to the other analysis files?
purpose_vs_actual: The path frames the file as an allocation batch for interpretive processing, and the content is exactly a list of allocated project files with root paths, so purpose and content align.
apparent_themes: Scoped file inventory for a single project
Separation of relative path and absolute root
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to define a small, focused work package of claude-ds files to be interpreted or fused in wave 001, batch 002.
novelty: It carries no code symbols, so it functions purely as a path-allocation record rather than a symbol-bearing substrate.
contribution: It contributes a scoped, self-contained set of file references with explicit project and root context that a fused system can use to locate and load the referenced substrates.
summary_for_embedding: A JSON allocation batch listing six files in the claude-ds project under /home/tim/company/design/claude-ds, including the manifest and several analysis documents.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to enumerate a specific subset of claude-ds files for interpretive processing in wave-001 batch-002.
